allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('version:', j.version\); console.log\('peerDeps:', JSON.stringify\(j.peerDependencies\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('main:', p.main\); console.log\('exports:', JSON.stringify\(p.exports, null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const m = require\('@medusajs/file-s3'\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(m\)\); console.log\('default:', typeof m.default\); console.log\('module:', typeof m.S3FileService || typeof m.default\)")
